_comment: Exit Gate Policy -- configures when deliberation should stop

evidence_coverage.description: Are primary sources present for the answer?

citation_integrity.description: Can the full provenance chain be traced?

scores.1: Partial chain (wiki note exists but manifest ref missing)
Ambiguity exists but no hard contradiction

grounding_status.description: What is the grounding level of cited notes?

scores.2: All cited notes grounded or verified

answer_completeness.description: Does the answer address the full query?

scores.2: Complete answer to the query as asked

instruction_compliance.description: Does the answer follow all user constraints (format, negative constraints, scope limits)?

scores.0: Violates negative constraints or ignores required format
scores.1: Follows some constraints but misses others
scores.2: Fully complies with all explicit instructions
